{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chimera's Mane
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10659
|idx=16
|description=Liquid moonlight given tangible form, these undulating strands radiate therapeutic serenity. One touch could lull warriors into blissful oblivion.
|skill=Summon Chimera, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=2160
|def=137
|atk=132
|rush=146
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ equipped, {race} HP +100
Purple or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=Water RES +60
|gene3=Earth RES +60
|gene4=In Dragon Form, {race} HP +400
|gene7=Water RES +180 (Awakened)
|}}
